notes: Installable PWA alpha for Android and Windows/browser testing.
Manual update checks and safe update status in Settings.
Notification permission flow and local test reminder support.
Household data remains separate from app files and survives normal app updates.
Optional Supabase manual sync foundation for sharing one household across phones.
Supports Supabase publishable keys that start with sb_publishable_.
Supabase Project URL field now accepts common copied URL formats and cleans them safely.
Added fuller edit/delete controls for debts, repayment history and savings goals.
Fixed Android number keypad closing while editing debt and savings amounts.
Reduced scrolling in Debt Tracker and Savings Goals with sticky add bars and compact expandable cards.
Refreshed the visual design with a cleaner banking-app inspired style.
Added a top hamburger app menu and collapsible finance summary sections.
Removed the bottom navigation panel, added smaller text, and changed Settings into expandable phone-style sections.
Added private Supabase Auth sync controls with backup-first safety, manual Sync now, guarded auto-sync and visible sync status.
Added updatedAt conflict handling so the newest item edit wins and a conflict warning is shown.
Added Streaming Services under Money without storing passwords.
Added RLS setup instructions, a Capacitor plan and a private Android beta checklist.
Improved dark-mode contrast for the dashboard greeting.
Polished sync messages for everyday two-phone use.
Added last synced time, this device name, connected members and a setup checklist.
Added a button to clear resolved conflict warnings after checking both phones.
Added automatic local restore points before sync changes.
Added a clearer restore-from-backup flow in Settings.
Added a sync status banner with last synced information on every main screen.
Added a beta hardening test plan for privacy, sync, backup and Android accessibility.
Added a richer household dashboard with money, subscriptions, household, shopping and sync summaries.
Added Calendar, Analytics and Household Assistant beta pages using existing household data.
Improved Android polish with consistent cards, icons, motion, empty states and progress visuals.
Changed accessibility settings so each signed-in household member can keep their own theme, contrast and text size.
